title: Iran Maintains Near-Total Internet Blackout Amid U.S.-Israeli Strikes
summary_full: As the war has stretched into its third week, the Iranian government has blocked internet access for most of its 92 million citizens.
summary_public: As the war has stretched into its third week, the Iranian government has blocked internet access for most of its 92 million citizens.
